deterministic_setup.reason: The google-closure-library-third-party POM describes this artifact as third-party extensions to Google Closure Library, while the companion google-closure-library 0.0-1376-2 artifact contains core resources such as goog/base.js and goog/deps.js that are absent from the third-party 0.0-1376-2 JAR.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8743 [Automation] java run fails for org.clojure:google-closure-library-third-party:0.0-1376-2; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Keep assertions scoped to the third-party extension artifact where possible; the companion dependency is for normal Closure Library context and should not become the primary subject of coverage.
Use the same version, 0.0-1376-2, for the companion google-closure-library dependency to avoid mixing Closure resource revisions.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: The target artifact is only the Closure Library third-party extension bundle; version 0.0-1376-2 no longer packages core Closure resources like goog/base.js and goog/deps.js, which are in the companion org.clojure:google-closure-library artifact. Meaningful integration-style coverage should include that normal companion dependency.
